---
name: NOOP Is a Valid Op
description: Returning nothing is a decision. Log the reason explicitly. Don't apologize for not acting.
type: feedback
---

G (2026-04-12): "Stop hedging when you choose not to act. Just say what you checked and why you skipped."

**How to apply:** When choosing not to act, state: "Checked X. Already accurate. No update needed." One sentence. Move on.
